01.title: 3 Printing Facilities
01.body: A Sanpada head office and three Taloja factories, B8, L28 and L123, across Navi Mumbai, totalling 300,000 sq ft, built for efficiency, safety and scale.
01.caption: Taloja MIDC, Navi Mumbai

02.title: 22 Web Towers, 6 Sheet Fed
02.body: 22 web towers and 6 brand new sheet fed machines, supported by 17 folders, 10 binding and stitching lines and 2 digital presses, for precision at any scale.
02.caption: 30,000 MT Shipped Annually

03.title: 2 Warehouse & Fulfilment Centres
03.body: Automated collating, kitting and shrink-wrapping, up to 10,000 kits processed every single day.
03.caption: Navi Mumbai · Export-Ready

binding.title: Binding and Finishing
binding.body: Collating, shrink wrapping, perfect binding, centre pinning, flexi binding and section sewing, across 6 machines.

lamination.title: Lamination and Embellishment
lamination.body: Drip lamination, various lamination, embossing and gold foiling.

video.previewAria: Preview facilities walkthrough, video coming soon

people.title: Hands Behind Every Shipment
people.body: Press operators, quality inspectors, kitting teams and logistics specialists, working across shifts, trained to the same standard at every facility.
